summary: This cluster synthesizes taxonomic and nomenclatural revisions within the freshwater algal class Conjugatophyceae (formerly Zygnematophyceae), focusing on the reclassification of key genera such as *Mougeotia*, *Mougeotiopsis*, and *Transeauina*. The research collectively traces the historical evolution of the group’s classification, documenting significant shifts in order- and species-level taxonomy. A shared methodological reliance on AlgaeBase data underpins the quantitative assessment of currently described species and their distribution within the newly defined class. Geographically and ecologically, the studies are united by a freshwater focus, emphasizing the global distribution of these conjugating green algae.
